module_info.docstring:
Welcome banner, ASCII art, and skills summary for the CLI.

Pure display functions with no HermesCLI state dependency.

functions.name: cprint
functions.docstring: Print ANSI-colored text through prompt_toolkit's renderer.

functions.name: get_available_skills
functions.docstring: Scan ~/.hermes/skills/ and return skills grouped by category.

functions.name: build_welcome_banner
functions.docstring:
Build and print a welcome banner with caduceus on left and info on right.

Args:
    console: Rich Console instance.
    model: Current model name.
    cwd: Current working directory.
    tools: List of tool definitions.
    enabled_toolsets: List of enabled toolset names.
    session_id: Session identifier.
    get_toolset_for_tool: Callable to map tool name -> toolset name.
